a8a5552e4d94.evidence: No Java Swing Administrator; REST management API + static operator shell (scope-vs-mirth.md)

12a2b7f4dfbc.mapping: Source Connectors catalog: HTTP webhook, MLLP, TCP listener, File Reader, Database Reader

f84c6390b80b.mapping: TCP transmission modes: MLLP / LF-terminated / length-prefixed framing

0f464f24cd13.mapping: Basic TCP transmission mode (LF / length-prefix framing)

c27980f69bbf.mapping: Destination Connectors catalog: HTTP, File, SMTP, TCP/MLLP, Database, Channel Writer outbound adapters

9c0f28631402.mapping: Polling settings: ScheduleSettings (Mode=Interval/Cron/Time) honored by File Reader + Database Reader

109fe06b21e3.mapping: Interval schedule (fixed period + optional initial delay)

56955c34b244.mapping: Time schedule (one or more wall-clock times per day, timezone-aware)

0b6bcd03be1a.mapping: Cron schedule (5- or 6-field expression, timezone-aware) via Cronos

7c8e4785a731.mapping: Destination Set Filter transformer step (Jint script with destinationSet.removeAllExcept/remove/removeAll)

203b41701989.mapping: Iterator pipeline support: filter rule + transformer step share an IterableResolver

90a10bc93515.mapping: Engine support for iterating message parts; the Mirth 'Assign To Iterator' UI task is replaced by the script-form iterator

933ef4ca2258.mapping: Database Reader source map: ScheduleSettings + dispatched message metadata; source-map seeding deferred (operator can populate via PreProcessor)

a10513ed9df1.mapping: File Reader source-map keys: originalFilename, fileDirectory, fileSize, fileLastModified seeded via smartconnect.sourcemap.json

e24813c8155e.mapping: HTTP Listener source-map keys: httpMethod, httpPath, httpContentType, httpHeaders, httpQuery seeded by AspNetCore inbound

d2df0999352d.mapping: TCP/MLLP Listener source-map keys: hl7.sendingApplication/sendingFacility/messageType/controlId/timestamp parsed from MSH

ecd047bb8c78.mapping: Channel Writer in-process source-map propagation via metadata pass-through

b0420a814a90.mapping: File Writer connector map: per-route connector bag isolated by ordinal; available as connectorMap.put/get in transforms

1355b11537ce.mapping: HTTP Sender connector map: per-route connector bag isolated by ordinal; available as connectorMap.put/get in transforms

9e0a1a681980.mapping: Variable maps: 7-scope binding (sourceMap, channelMap, connectorMap, responseMap, globalChannelMap, globalMap, configurationMap) exposed to JS plus $() walker

7005e791f922.mapping: Connector Map: per-route, per-message ConnectorMaps bag (isolated between destinations) on FlowExecutionContext

85183e12a370.mapping: Channel Map: per-message in-memory ChannelMap on FlowExecutionContext (mutable across all stages of one dispatch)

95e469fce0de.mapping: Source Map: read-only per-message dictionary on FlowExecutionContext; hydrated from smartconnect.sourcemap.json metadata

c8d4405adeff.mapping: Response Map: engine auto-populates ResponseMap[routeName] = { status, payload | error } after each outbound SendAsync

b839f4a9582a.mapping: Global Channel Map: persisted per-flow scope (existing IVariableMapStore.GlobalChannel) bound as globalChannelMap

91920d9ae4e3.mapping: Global Map: persisted server-wide scope (existing IVariableMapStore.Global) bound as globalMap

d58569767feb.mapping: Variable Map Lookup Sequence: $(key) walks Response→Connector→Channel→Source→GlobalChannel→Global→Configuration; missing key → JS undefined

81ce8b48b3c0.mapping: Library Resources: CodeTemplateLibrary entity + EF persistence (separate from channel storage)

7cb9a8890739.mapping: Edit Code Templates View: headless equivalent via REST admin API at /smartconnect/v1/admin/code-template-libraries

bd08744ff76d.mapping: Code Template Library Table: GET /smartconnect/v1/admin/code-template-libraries returns the library list (REST-equivalent of MC table view)

1b419734c6fa.mapping: Edit Library Panel: PUT/POST library aggregate via REST; library fields are Name/Description/LinkedFlowIds/AutoLinkNewFlows/Templates

e56460f67110.mapping: Link Libraries to Channels: bidirectional reconciliation (library.LinkedFlowIds + pipeline.LinkedLibraryIds) with AutoLinkNewFlows seeding

af35697d05d5.mapping: Edit Code Template Panel: template fields are Name/Code/Type/Contexts/JsDoc, persisted in CodeTemplateEntity

38b667d9e077.mapping: Code Template Contexts: 17-value CodeTemplateContext enum; CodeTemplateJsBinder injects matching templates per FlowExecutionContext.CurrentStageContext

02b976218fe6.mapping: Use JSDoc in Code Templates: JsDoc string preserved on CodeTemplate entity; Jint ignores it at runtime (Mirth-compatible behavior)

fd99234d2268.mapping: Code Template Tasks: full REST CRUD (POST/GET/PUT/DELETE) + import endpoints replace the Mirth UI task menu

21fe3d03e7ea.mapping: Import Code Templates / Libraries: POST /import (JSON array) + POST /import-mirth-xml (Mirth XStream-format XML)

22cab570408f.mapping: Built-In Code Templates: BuiltInCodeTemplatesSeeder writes 6 starter templates (formatHl7Date/parseHl7Date/escapeXml/escapeHl7/makeAck/generateGuid) under a well-known library Id

454721e1f823.mapping: Attachment Handlers: AttachmentExtractionPipeline runs between PreProcessor and route filters; resolves IAttachmentHandler from IFlowPluginRegistry by AttachmentHandlerSlot.Kind

e0d1b0c489f4.mapping: Reattachment: AttachmentReattachmentService inflates ${ATTACH:<id>} tokens to bytes on routes with ReattachAttachments=true (off by default per Mirth UG p220)

16d136564ce4.mapping: Attachment MIME Types: AttachmentEntity.MimeType (default application/octet-stream) round-trips per attachment; bytes endpoint serves Content-Type from this column

4890e76d7fcf.mapping: Attachment Handler Properties: AttachmentHandlerSlot.PropertiesJson holds handler-specific JSON; each handler parses its own keys (pattern/script/extractTags/customKind/mimeType)

b32b8acf3e75.mapping: Entire Message Attachment Handler: kind=entire-message; whole payload becomes one attachment, replaced inline with a single ${ATTACH:<id>} token

34b2ca8103b1.mapping: Regex Attachment Handler: kind=regex; extracts capture group 1 of each match into a separate attachment; pattern + regexOptions configurable via properties JSON

bbaea87685b5.mapping: DICOM Attachment Handler: kind=dicom; parses payload via fo-dicom, extracts PixelData (and configurable tags) as attachments; placeholder reference written back into the dataset

41352218137a.mapping: JavaScript Attachment Handler: kind=javascript; user script runs in Jint with msg + addAttachment(data,type) global; variable maps + code templates (context=AttachmentHandler) bound alongside

9e58f5372f2d.mapping: Extract Attachments: opt-in by configuring AttachmentHandlerSlot.Kind != none; pipeline returns rewritten payload + IAttachmentStore.AddAsync persists each attachment

eac4fcd31629.mapping: addAttachment(data, type) JS API: AttachmentJsBinder.Bind exposes a global function on every JS plugin engine (filter/transform/preprocessor/postprocessor + JS handler); returns ${ATTACH:<id>} token

9adfacb7123e.mapping: Custom Attachment Handler: kind=custom; CustomAttachmentHandlerHost looks up properties.customKind in IFlowPluginRegistry under custom:<suffix>; plugin authors register their own IAttachmentHandler

185f2e590ff8.mapping: Edit Alert View: headless equivalent via REST admin API at /smartconnect/v1/admin/alert-rules/{id} (full CRUD + /test endpoint); AlertEngine fires matching rules from FlowRuntimeEngine failure path with 3 action providers (email, webhook, channel-redispatch) and throttled per-process firing
